title: Tsunami 16x
body:
> ### A Blue Bedwars Resource Pack
> 
> **What this resource pack changes:**
> - All the terracota/Hardened Clay 
> - All the different wool colors
> - The bed
> - The Ladder
> - Chest gui + inventory gui
> - Transparent Blue Hotbar
> - All the swords
> - All the axes and pickaxes
> - Hearts, Armor bars, Hunger bars and the XP Bar
> - Grass Block (just an outline)
> - All the planks
> - All the logs are now the New Log Textures
> - Cobblestone is now shinier
> - Glass is clearer (not stained glass)
> - Golden Apple
> - Bow
> - Fishing Rod
> - All the armor textures (not the item ones the ones you see when ur wearing them)
> - New Arrow Texture for the item and the entity
> 
> **Notice:**
> This pack is only for bedwars, it doesnt change some containers like
> the crafting table!
